dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My name is Hobin Yu. And my life is a living hell.

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) Another day, another beating. It's always the same. Pakgo, his camera, and me.

dialogue.speaker: Pakgo
dialogue.line: Alright, Hobin, time for your daily dose of fame! Say hi to the camera, everyone!

dialogue.speaker: Jiksae
dialogue.line: Yeah, smile for the viewers, loser! Pakgo's NewTube channel needs content!

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yu
dialogue.line: P-Pakgo... please... I don't have any money today. I already gave you everything yesterday...

dialogue.speaker: Pakgo
dialogue.line: Money? Who said anything about money today? We're doing a special segment! 'Hobin's Humiliation Hour'!

dialogue.speaker: Jiksae
dialogue.line: Ooh, good one, Pakgo! The viewers will love this!

dialogue.speaker: Pakgo
dialogue.line: Alright, Hobin, for today's challenge, I want you to bark like a dog. A really pathetic dog.

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) My face burns. My stomach twists. I hate this. I hate them. I hate myself for letting this happen.

dialogue.speaker: Pakgo
dialogue.line: What, no bark? Fine. Maybe this will loosen your tongue.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SMACK!

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yu
dialogue.line: Agh!

dialogue.speaker: Pakgo
dialogue.line: That's for being slow! Now, bark!

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) My cheek stings. Tears well up, but I can't let them see. Not again. I just want to disappear.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: KICK!

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yu
dialogue.line: Ugh!

dialogue.speaker: Jiksae
dialogue.line: Haha! Look at him squirm! Gold content!

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) This is my life. Every single day. No one helps. No one cares. I'm just... a punching bag. A joke for their viewers.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Lying on the dirty alley ground, Hobin's phone, which Pakgo had snatched earlier, lay forgotten beside him. It was still recording.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BEEP! (Phone notification)

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) What was that? A NewTube notification? On my phone...?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Through blurry eyes, Hobin saw the screen. A suggested video. 'How to Fight: Basic Self-Defense for Beginners.'

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) How to fight...? Me? That's ridiculous. I'm the weakest kid in school. I can't even stand up straight.

dialogue.speaker: Pakgo
dialogue.line: Alright, that's enough for today! Jiksae, send that clip to the editor. We'll make a killing!

dialogue.speaker: Jiksae
dialogue.line: You got it, boss! See ya tomorrow, Hobin! Don't forget to practice your barks!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FOOTSTEPS FADE

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) They're gone. Finally. I pick up my phone, my hand trembling. The video is still there. 'How to Fight.'

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) What if...? What if I actually learned? Just a little bit? Would it change anything? Could I... could I stop this?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A flicker of something he hadn't felt in a long time ignited within him. Not hope, not yet. But a desperate, burning curiosity.

dialogue.speaker: Hobin Yu
dialogue.line: (Thought) I have nothing left to lose. Absolutely nothing.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: TAP! (Finger presses screen)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The video began to play. And with it, the first clumsy, uncertain step towards a new path.

summary: Hobin Yu, a constantly bullied high school student, endures another humiliating session at the hands of Pakgo and his sidekick Jiksae, who film everything for their NewTube channel. After they leave, Hobin notices a 'How to Fight' tutorial video on his phone, sparking a desperate, new resolve.
